title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Cracker, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Judge, Nami as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WH-WHY IS ONE OF THE HERALDED SWEET THREE COMMANDERS IN THIS FOREST...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! am I not good enough to be here or somethin'?!!

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: Forgive our Inso- Lance, Lord Cracker!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Eeeeeee Eekk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You sure got some balls!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: crashing my party, sticking your nose where it don't belong, and doing it all in plain sight, Randolph!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My apologies... he forced me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Liar!!! You dragged me here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Someone can tell

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They spoke!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So he must be a big shot then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's definitely strong, that's for sure.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama is a woman who always seizes the initiative ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Straw hat Luffy" is the man who brought down doflamingo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: since BRILEe would probably have her hands full with you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah-JU! Yeah-ju!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She sent me along.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I take exception to that, brother!!! I can't simply let that slide!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If she had simply given me the word...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That was rude and insulting !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd have slaughtered him in the blink of an eye!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Agreed- JU!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Awesome!! A monster tree!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ah!! It's that lady...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Up until today, not a single person...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Targetted by us has left our team's "forest of temptation" alive-ju!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: master of the forest of temptation KING BAUM

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, that's fine and all... but we ain't got the time for these coy little games of yours.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Tomorrow afternoon, all the Vinsmoke family's brothers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will be in attendance at whole cake chateau.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: This Union with the Vinsmoke family...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...as it'll finally mean the acquisition of the "Germa 66" military force along with their research and science division.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is an event mama has long waited for.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I know that already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: YAAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: BARK BARK !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'mr room oww!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whooa!! They turned into ani- mals!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hoot Hoot !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so how come that one branch is talking?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not a branch, you dimwit!! Feast your eyes on this, straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahh!!! Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Nami!! Save us...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the?! What happened, you guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How did you end up in there?!

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: He shoved us into this mirror world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He uses the power of mirrors!! Be careful!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Until with little!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: Whaddya think of that, brother cracker?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've already got these guys by the scruff of their necks!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AAAAA AAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chopper! Carrot!! Speak to me!!! Are you all right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're fine!! It's not like we ourselves actually shattered!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! Hold on a sec!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
